title: Rust coverage uplift: gossip module
description: Target rust/src/gossip.rs (~61.54%, ~450 uncovered lines). Add focused tests for transport selection, env precedence, parse failures, and broker fallback/error branches.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Coverage progress (implemented):
- Added tests in rust/src/gossip.rs for run_gossip_consumer edge behavior:
  - unknown project filter returns explicit error
  - broker=off path returns Ok when broker_off_is_error=false and returns error when true
- Added test config helper to exercise real config-loading code path (no mocks).
- Validation: cargo test --locked --lib gossip::tests:: -> 22 passed, 0 failed.
- Full rust llvm-cov rerun + cobertura refresh complete.
- Module delta: gossip.rs improved from 67.39% to 72.05% line coverage (1044/1449).
- Overall Rust line coverage now 82.86%.
